What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a red short-sleeved shirt stands behind a dark grey bar counter. Several metal and glass bartending tools, including a cocktail shaker, mixing glass, martini glass, and jigger, are arranged on the surface in front of him. Rows of liquor bottles with various colored labels and caps fill the shelves in the background behind the man. The man gestures with his right hand near his chest while standing still.
